description: You are an audio director formatting a raw dialogue export for a voice recording session. Open ~/Documents/raw_dialogue.docx and format the pipe-delimited text into a professional Voice-Over script. The document must be in Landscape orientation with all text converted into a single 4-column table. Include a header row with the column titles 'Audio ID', 'Character', 'Voice Direction', and 'Dialogue', formatted with bold text and a shaded background. In the table body, format the Character column as bold and the Voice Direction column as italic. Add a document header with the text 'Project: NOTLD - Studio VO Script' and include page numbers in the footer. Save the final document as ~/Documents/NOTLD_VO_Script.docx.

metadata.data_source: Night of the Living Dead (1968) public domain screenplay
